title: 将 Harness Runner 指南改为一级直达入口并适配菜单排序
summary: Promoted showGuide to root-level command and added runtime compatibility for legacy 'guides' entries in harness-runner.rootMenuOrder. Change is runtime-only and keeps package.json/localization keys stable. Existing tests remain passing.
riskReasons: Runtime-only menu presentation change; no package.json or prd.json edits.
Edge-case workspace settings mixing legacy alias and canonical keys may require extra normalization in future.
releaseNotes: Expose 'HARNESS: Harness Runner 指南' as a root-level command. Users with existing workspace settings using the legacy 'guides' token will keep their configured menu order via runtime injection.
rollbackHints: Revert the commit to restore previous behavior. Workspace settings remain intact and will display canonical entries unless alias injection is re-enabled.

architectureNotes.moduleBoundaries: Ordering and alias handling localized to src/extension.ts; localization and menu editor remain unchanged.
architectureNotes.responsibilityClarity: Menu composition and ordering handled in extension; menuOrderEditor handles editing payload validation.

followUps: Add a regression test covering persisted 'guides' in workspace settings.
Consider extracting alias mapping into a reusable utility for menu-related code paths.
